'''lovashaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:buccodistal|buccodistal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-v-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:buccodistal|buccodistal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lovashaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovashithi|lovashithi]] || [[word:lovashiji|lovashiji]] || [[word:lovashishi|lovashishi]] || [[word:lovashiki|lovashiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovashuthuthu|lovashuthuthu]] || [[word:lovashujuju|lovashujuju]] || [[word:lovashushushu|lovashushushu]] || [[word:lovashukuku|lovashukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovashuthu|lovashuthu]] || [[word:lovashuju|lovashuju]] || [[word:lovashushu|lovashushu]] || [[word:lovashuku|lovashuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovashufthuf|lovashufthuf]] || [[word:lovashufjuf|lovashufjuf]] || [[word:lovashufshuf|lovashufshuf]] || [[word:lovashufkuf|lovashufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovashethe|lovashethe]] || [[word:lovasheje|lovasheje]] || [[word:lovasheshe|lovasheshe]] || [[word:lovasheke|lovasheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovashothotho|lovashothotho]] || [[word:lovashojojo|lovashojojo]] || [[word:lovashoshosho|lovashoshosho]] || [[word:lovashokoko|lovashokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovashotho|lovashotho]] || [[word:lovashojo|lovashojo]] || [[word:lovashosho|lovashosho]] || [[word:lovashoko|lovashoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovashofthof|lovashofthof]] || [[word:lovashofjof|lovashofjof]] || [[word:lovashofshof|lovashofshof]] || [[word:lovashofkof|lovashofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovashïfthïf|lovashïfthïf]] || [[word:lovashïfjïf|lovashïfjïf]] || [[word:lovashïfshïf|lovashïfshïf]] || [[word:lovashïfkïf|lovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovashïfthïfthïf|lovashïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:lovashïfjïfjïf|lovashïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:lovashïfshïfshïf|lovashïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:lovashïfkïfkïf|lovashïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovashïfthïf|lovashïfthïf]] || [[word:lovashïfjïf|lovashïfjïf]] || [[word:lovashïfshïf|lovashïfshïf]] || [[word:lovashïfkïf|lovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovashïfthïf|lovashïfthïf]] || [[word:lovashïfjïf|lovashïfjïf]] || [[word:lovashïfshïf|lovashïfshïf]] || [[word:lovashïfkïf|lovashïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lovashæthæ|lovashæthæ]] || [[word:lovashæjæ|lovashæjæ]] || [[word:lovashæshæ|lovashæshæ]] || [[word:lovashækæ|lovashækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lovashathatha|lovashathatha]] || [[word:lovashajaja|lovashajaja]] || [[word:lovashashasha|lovashashasha]] || [[word:lovashakaka|lovashakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lovashatha|lovashatha]] || [[word:lovashaja|lovashaja]] || [[word:lovashasha|lovashasha]] || [[word:lovashaka|lovashaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lovashafthaf|lovashafthaf]] || [[word:lovashafjaf|lovashafjaf]] || [[word:lovashafshaf|lovashafshaf]] || [[word:lovashafkaf|lovashafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lovashasha|lovashasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lovashësha|lovashësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lovashrosha|lovashrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lovashmusha|lovashmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lovashyasha|lovashyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golovashnkshësha|golovashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golovashnkrosha|golovashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golovashnkmusha|golovashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golovashnkyasha|golovashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lovavashasha|lovavashasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lovavashësha|lovavashësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lovavashrosha|lovavashrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lovavashmusha|lovavashmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lovavashyasha|lovavashyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golovavashnkshësha|golovavashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golovavashnkrosha|golovavashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golovavashnkmusha|golovavashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golovavashnkyasha|golovavashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:levæshasha|levæshasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:levæshësha|levæshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:levæshrosha|levæshrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:levæshmusha|levæshmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:levæshyasha|levæshyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golevæshnkshësha|golevæshnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golevæshnkrosha|golevæshnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golevæshnkmusha|golevæshnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golevæshnkyasha|golevæshnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lovfashasha|lovfashasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lovfashësha|lovfashësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lovfashrosha|lovfashrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lovfashmusha|lovfashmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lovfashyasha|lovfashyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golovfashnkshësha|golovfashnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golovfashnkrosha|golovfashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golovfashnkmusha|golovfashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golovfashnkyasha|golovfashnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
